---
name: Bug report
about: Something in a skill or the tooling behaved incorrectly
title: ''
labels: bug
---

**Which skill**
stackreason / architecture-review / capacity-estimate / interview-drill / diagram-only

**Which agent and platform**
e.g. Claude Code CLI, Codex, Cursor.

**What you asked for**

**What happened**

**What you expected**

**Validator output**
If a generated design is involved:

```
node skills/stackreason/references/validate.js path/to/design.html
```

**Generated file**
Attach it if you can share it. The HTML is self-contained, so a single file reproduces the whole problem.
